productDisplayName: Locomotive Men Check Lai Grey Shirts
description: CompositionGrey plaid check full sleeve shirt made of 100% cotton, has white and light blue accents, tape detailing on inseam of the collar, patch pocket on the left chest with buttoned flap and brand name over it, full length buttoned placket that has tri-tone buttons, sleeves with buttoned cuffs and buttons at the elbows and curved hemlineFittingSlimWash care Machine wash at 40 degrees Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry on normal or line dry Warm iron Get ready to take casual dressing to the next level with this  grey plaid check shirt from locomotive. The cool cotton fabric keeps you fresh all day while you hang out with your friends. The sleeves can be rolled up for a different look. This shirt can be teamed with low slung jeans and canvas shoes for a laidback look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.11", Shoulders-17.5 "
